release_notes: Critical probe fix + UI polish. Probe /json/new switched from GET to PUT (Chrome DevTools requires PUT; GET in 0.3.76-0.3.77 returned HTTP 405 for every probe). Engine block hides the Reinstall button when up-to-date — replaced with green badge + small text-link for the rare recovery case. Launcher block 'Проверить сейчас' → 'Проверить обновления' (RU) and 'Check now' → 'Check for updates' (EN) to match the engine block. Empirically re-verified on Cloud4Box: PUT /json/new returns the full sannysoft DOM (40KB with Intoli marker).
